CustomField.description: Local field created for to set the field dependency and control the role options for the respective Asset/Contract parties.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the party type associated with the account. Based on the selected type, relevant role options will be displayed. If "Contract" is selected, only roles defined for contract parties will be shown. If "Asset" is selected, only roles applicable to asset parties will be available. Selecting "Generic" will display all role options regardless of type.
CustomField.label: Party Type
